skipped.message: Pas de pagination (moins d'une page de produits)

failure.message:
AssertionError: La page a été chargée correctement, erreur : assert 'Page not found' == '404'
- 404 + Page not found assert False

testcase.failure:
tests\test_CT_002_LLM_GENERIC_GeneratedTestCase_generated_test_case.py:25: in test_CT_002 assert error_element.text == "404" E AssertionError: assert 'Page not found' == '404' E E - 404 E + Page not found
